topArticle.title: Australia's most-decorated soldier vows to fight war crime charges
topArticle.description: Ben Roberts-Smith has given his first statement since he was charged with five counts of the war crime of murder last week.
topArticle.titleJa: オーストラリアの勲章を受けた兵士、戦争犯罪容疑と闘うことを誓う
topArticle.summary: オーストラリアで最も勲章を受けた兵士ベン・ロバーツ＝スミスが、殺人罪の戦争犯罪5件で起訴され、容疑と闘う姿勢を表明した。

topArticle.title: Zelensky condemns US extension of Russian sanctions waiver
topArticle.description: The US argues that the waiver is meant to ease the energy supply crunch sparked by the US-Israel war with Iran.
topArticle.titleJa: ゼレンスキー氏、米国によるロシア制裁免除延長を非難
topArticle.summary: ゼレンスキー大統領は、米国がロシアへの制裁免除措置を延長したことを非難。米国側は、この措置が米国・イスラエルとイランの紛争によるエネルギー不足緩和のためと説明している。

topArticle.title: Mexican government partially unblocks secure internet
topArticle.description: The Tor network is used by millions of users daily to securely access the internet, safeguard their right to information and freedom of expression, and avoid censorship or government surveillance.
topArticle.titleJa: メキシコ政府が安全なインターネットの一部ブロックを解除
topArticle.summary: メキシコ政府がTorネットワークの一部ブロックを解除。これにより、国民の情報への権利と表現の自由が守られ、政府の検閲や監視を回避できるようになった。

topArticle.title: Bodies of 50 infants dumped at Trinidad graveyard
topArticle.description: Police say a preliminary investigation shows it may be a case of an "unlawful disposal of unclaimed corpses".
topArticle.titleJa: トリニダードの墓地で乳児50人の遺体が投棄される
topArticle.summary: トリニダードの墓地で乳児50人の遺体が投棄された状態で発見された。警察は、引き取り手のない遺体の不法投棄である可能性が高いと発表している。

topArticle.title: Attacks on US academics: A microcosm of a larger threat to democracy
topArticle.description: In the new DW documentary "Democracy Under Attack: Can Dündar and Trump's America," the Turkish press freedom icon looks at the parallels between the erosion of democracy in the US and his home country.
topArticle.titleJa: 米国の学者への攻撃：民主主義へのより大きな脅威の縮図
topArticle.summary: 新ドキュメンタリーで、トルコの報道の自由の象徴が、米国とトルコにおける民主主義の浸食の類似点を考察。学術界への攻撃が広範な民主主義の危機を反映していると指摘した。

topArticle.title: When climate change impairs beekeeping in the Democratic Republic of the Congo
topArticle.description: Climate change negatively impacts human, animal, and plant species. In the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), this crisis is leading beehives, which are vital to food security, to run dry.
topArticle.titleJa: コンゴ民主共和国で気候変動が養蜂を阻害するとき
topArticle.summary: コンゴ民主共和国では、気候変動により養蜂が深刻な影響を受け、食料安全保障に不可欠なミツバチの巣が干上がっている。

topArticle.title: How the Israeli military targets the people who save lives
topArticle.description: Israeli attacks have killed at least 57 medical workers in Lebanon since early March. It is a pattern lifted from Gaza.
topArticle.titleJa: イスラエル軍がいかにして人命救助者を標的にしているか
topArticle.summary: イスラエル軍の攻撃により、3月初旬以降レバノンで少なくとも57人の医療従事者が殺害された。これはガザでのパターンを踏襲したものとされている。

topArticle.title: Germany's crime figures: Comparing apples to oranges?
topArticle.description: Is it true that the crime rate in Germany is higher among immigrants? Statistics suggest as much, but numbers by themselves can be misleading. An expert explains what's behind them.
topArticle.titleJa: ドイツの犯罪統計：比較は適切か？
topArticle.summary: ドイツにおける移民の犯罪率に関する統計が取り上げられ、その数字の誤解を専門家が解説。社会的な問題提起がされている。

topArticle.title: Rat poison found in HiPP jarred baby food in Austria, police say
topArticle.description: The band warned on Saturday that consuming the purées many be potentially "life-threatening".
topArticle.titleJa: オーストリアでヒップ社製ベビーフードから殺鼠剤が見つかる、警察発表
topArticle.summary: オーストリアで人気ベビーフードブランド「ヒップ」の瓶詰め製品から殺鼠剤が検出され、警察が警告。摂取は命に関わる可能性がある。

topArticle.title: Robot runners beat humans in Beijing half-marathon
topArticle.description: For the first time, humanoid robots have outclassed humans in a half-marathon held in Beijing. The winner beat the men's record for the distance set by Uganda’s Jacob Kiplimo in March.
topArticle.titleJa: ロボットランナーが北京ハーフマラソンで人間を打ち負かす
topArticle.summary: 北京で開催されたハーフマラソンで、人型ロボットが史上初めて人間を凌駕し、男子記録を更新した。テクノロジーとスポーツの融合を示す画期的な出来事。

topArticle.title: India protests Iran fire on two vessels in Strait of Hormuz
topArticle.description: New Delhi summoned Iran's envoy after two India-flagged vessels were attacked while attempting to cross the Strait of Hormuz. DW has the latest.
topArticle.titleJa: インド、ホルムズ海峡でのイランによる2隻への砲撃に抗議
topArticle.summary: インド政府は、ホルムズ海峡でインド船籍の2隻が攻撃されたことに対し、イラン大使を召喚し抗議した。地域間の緊張が高まっている。

topArticle.title: Bulgarians vote in high-stakes election
topArticle.description: Bulgarian voters are going to the polls for the eighth time in five years amid a long-running political crisis. A new left-leaning, pro-Russian party under former President Radev is seen as favorite to win.
topArticle.titleJa: ブルガリア人が高利害の選挙で投票
topArticle.summary: ブルガリアでは長期にわたる政治危機の中、5年間で8度目の選挙が実施される。新左派の親ロシア政党が優勢と見られており、国の政治的安定が問われている。

topArticle.title: Iran war: Tehran says 'progress' made in talks with US
topArticle.description: Iran's top negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said there was still "a big distance" between the two sides. Iran on Saturday again closed the Strait of Hormuz. Follow DW for more.
topArticle.titleJa: イラン戦争：テヘラン、米国との協議で「進展」と発表
topArticle.summary: イランは米国との協議で進展があったと発表したが、大きな隔たりも残る。イランはホルムズ海峡を再び閉鎖し、国際的な緊張が高まっている。

topArticle.title: Spain, Brazil, Mexico vow to boost Cuba aid amid US threats
topArticle.description: The pledge comes amid a US oil embargo and Donald Trump's threats to invade the island. Leftist leaders meeting in Barcelona also spoke against the global far-right threat.
topArticle.titleJa: スペイン、ブラジル、メキシコが米国の脅威下にあるキューバへの支援強化を誓約
topArticle.summary: 米国の石油禁輸と侵攻の脅威に対し、スペイン、ブラジル、メキシコがキューバへの支援強化を表明。バルセロナでの会合では、世界の極右勢力への反対も訴えられた。

topArticle.title: Kenyan firm sacks more than 1,000 workers after losing Meta contract
topArticle.description:
Meta paused work with Sama last month after allegations about staff viewing private scenes filmed by smart glasses
More than 1,000 low-paid workers in Kenya have been abruptly sacked by an outsourcing company contracted by Meta, in what activists said was a shocking move exposing the precariousness of tech jobs in the global south.
Sama, a company based in Nairobi to which Meta outsourced content moderation and AI training work, announced on Thursday that the workers were being laid off after Meta terminated a contract.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: ケニア企業、Metaとの契約解消で1,000人超を解雇
topArticle.summary: ケニアのアウトソーシング企業Samaは、Metaとの契約終了に伴い、1,000人以上の従業員を解雇しました。これはグローバルサウスのテクノロジー職の不安定さを示しています。

topArticle.title: Weather tracker: hail covers parts of Tunisia and Algeria like snow
topArticle.description:
Accumulations of up to 3cm deep reported as severe thunderstorms also bring heavy downpours to central Italy
Severe thunderstorms have affected the Mediterranean this week. On Monday, a surface low-pressure system in the Mediterranean in conjunction with an upper air cut-off low, led to thunderstorms over north Africa. Their intensity was aided by the hot precursor conditions.
Algeria and Tunisia were notably affected by the thunderstorms, with some hail accumulation layers as a result. When so much hail forms, it starts to lay down sheets of hail, covering the ground like snow. Hail accumulations of up to 3cm were reported in Oum Ladjoul and Hammam Sokhna in Algeria, and there were hailstones of up to 3cm in diameter in Makthar, Tunisia. Thunderstorms continued in the region through the following day, with further hail accumulations, notably in Ouled Bousmir, Tunisia, where there was a layer about 2cm deep.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: 天候追跡：チュニジアとアルジェリアの一部で雪のように雹が積もる
topArticle.summary: 今週、地中海で激しい雷雨が発生し、チュニジアとアルジェリアの一部では最大3cmの雹が積もり、雪のような光景となりました。

topArticle.title: What next for South African opposition firebrand Malema after his five-year prison sentence?
topArticle.description: The sentence raises huge questions marks over the political future of one of South Africa's most controversial politicians.
topArticle.titleJa: 南アフリカの野党の闘士マレマ、5年の禁固刑後の未来は？
topArticle.summary: 南アフリカの物議を醸す政治家マレマが5年の禁固刑を言い渡され、その政治的未来に大きな疑問が投げかけられている。

topArticle.title: Three years of messages at once - a chronicle of Sudan's war pours in as trapped reporter's phone turns on
topArticle.description: As the conflict enters its fourth year, journalist Mohamed Suleiman shudders at what has been lost.
topArticle.titleJa: 閉じ込められた記者の携帯電話が繋がり、スーダン戦争の3年分のメッセージが一挙に押し寄せる
topArticle.summary: 紛争4年目のスーダンで、閉じ込められた記者の携帯電話が繋がり、3年分のメッセージが一挙に到着。記者は失われたものに身震いした。

topArticle.title: Suspicion surrounds death of US influencer Ashly Robinson in Zanzibar
topArticle.description:
Lifestyle influencer died while on vacation with boyfriend, who local officials say has since had his passport ‘withheld’
Ashly Robinson, a US lifestyle influencer, died last week while on vacation in the Tanzanian islands of Zanzibar with her boyfriend, Joe McCann. Robinson’s death on 9 April, just days after her birthday and a marriage proposal from McCann, has sparked suspicion on social media, with users doubtful of the current narrative surrounding her death.
No arrests have been made, and police previously said that McCann was not suspected of wrongdoing. But officials in Zanzibar released a statement on Tuesday saying that McCann’s passport has been “withheld”.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: 米国インフルエンサー、アシュリー・ロビンソンさんのザンジバルでの死に疑惑
topArticle.summary: 米国のインフルエンサー、アシュリー・ロビンソンさんがタンザニアのザンジバルで休暇中に死亡。恋人のパスポートが「差し止め」られるなど、死を巡る疑惑が広がっています。

topArticle.title: US eases sanctions on state-run Venezuelan banks
topArticle.description: The move will make it easier for the banks to conduct transactions in dollars.
topArticle.titleJa: 米国、ベネズエラ国営銀行への制裁を緩和
topArticle.summary: 米国がベネズエラの国営銀行に対する制裁を緩和し、これにより銀行はドル建て取引をより容易に行えるようになります。

topArticle.title: Air Canada temporarily suspends some flights to New York and other locations
topArticle.description:
Separately, Spirit Airlines reportedly seeks emergency US government funds as Iran war keeps aviation fuel costs high

Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get newsletter alerts in your inbox

Air Canada has announced a temporary suspension of flights from Toronto and Montreal to New York’s John F Kennedy airport, citing rising fuel prices.
The move comes amid growing concerns that airlines worldwide may scale back services as aviation fuel costs climb in the wake of the US and Israel’s ongoing war with Iran, which entered a fragile ceasefire earlier in April. Although Iran announced on Friday that the strait of Hormuz had reopened, helping ease oil prices, fuel costs remain significantly elevated after weeks of disruption.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: エア・カナダ、ニューヨークなどへの一部フライトを一時運休
topArticle.summary: エア・カナダは燃料費高騰を理由に、トロントとモントリオールからニューヨークJFK空港などへの一部フライトを一時停止しました。イラン紛争後の燃料高が影響しています。

topArticle.title: Pedro Pascal v Pedro Piscal: actor in legal battle with Chilean spirit brand
topArticle.description:
Pedro Piscal pisco is latest Chilean brand to resemble a Hollywood name – and others have fought off the lawsuits
The actor Pedro Pascal is waging a legal battle against a Chilean pisco merchant who has chosen a cheeky name for his brand of the country’s national spirit: Pedro Piscal.
David Herrera registered the brand name with a Chilean commercial regulator in 2023 and began selling his pisco in off-licences and restaurants.
 Continue reading...
topArticle.titleJa: ペドロ・パスカル対ペドロ・ピスカル：俳優がチリの酒類ブランドと法廷闘争
topArticle.summary: 俳優のペドロ・パスカルが、自身の名前に似たチリのピスコブランド「ペドロ・ピスカル」を相手に法廷闘争を繰り広げています。

topArticle.title: EU and Magyar agreed to work together for release of EU cash after weekend talks
topArticle.description: Ursula von der Leyen's right-hand man sent to Budapest to begin work for the release of €10 billion as Magyar races to unfreeze the cash in exchange of reforms. According to sources involved in the negotiations, the release of funds is not connected to Ukraine.
topArticle.titleJa: EUとハンガリー、週末の協議後、EU資金解放に向け協力で合意
topArticle.summary: 欧州委員会がハンガリーの改革と引き換えに100億ユーロの凍結解除に向けて協力することで合意。資金の解放はウクライナとは無関係とされる。

topArticle.title: 'Every drop of water counts': Fear for the future of Argentina's glaciers

topArticle.titleJa: 「一滴の水も大切」：アルゼンチンの氷河の未来への懸念
topArticle.summary: アルゼンチンで氷河の保護を緩和する物議を醸す法律が可決され、鉱業への道が開かれました。これにより、氷河の未来への懸念が高まっています。

topArticle.title: North Korea conducts multiple ballistic missile tests
topArticle.description: North Korea fired several short-range ballistic missiles into the East Sea on Sunday, the latest in a series of recent weapons tests that analysts say signal Pyongyang's rejection of South Korea's attempts to ease tensions.
topArticle.titleJa: 北朝鮮が複数弾道ミサイルを発射

topArticle.title: Fire razes 200 homes in Sabah, leaving hundreds homeless

topArticle.title: Cash shortages grip Yemen despite currency stabilisation

topArticle.titleJa: 通貨安定にもかかわらずイエメンを襲う現金不足
topArticle.summary: 通貨安定化が進むにもかかわらず、イエメンでは現金不足が深刻化。流動性危機の中で両替業者が通貨換算を制限し、国民の不満が高まっている。

topArticle.title: Prominent Palestinian prisoner Marwan Barghouti assaulted three times in a month, family says
topArticle.description: The Israeli Prison Service says the allegation that Barghouti was subjected to physical violence by prison guards are "false and baseless".
topArticle.titleJa: 著名なパレスチナ人囚人マルワン・バルグーティ、1ヶ月で3度暴行されると家族が証言
topArticle.summary: 著名なパレスチナ人囚人マルワン・バルグーティが、1ヶ月の間に3度暴行を受けたと家族が主張。イスラエル刑務所は「虚偽で根拠がない」と反論している。

topArticle.title: Sri Lanka repatriates 238 Iranian sailors stranded after US torpedo attack
topArticle.description: The survivors of the US attack on Iranian vessel Iris Dena, which claimed the lives of 104 people, were among those sent home.

topArticle.title: Millions listen to Ethiopian star's song taking swipe at government

topArticle.title: Zimbabwe's iconic stone birds were taken by colonialists. Finally, they're all back home
topArticle.description: For centuries the prized sculptures, central to national identity, have been kept outside Zimbabwe's borders.
topArticle.titleJa: 植民地主義者に奪われたジンバブエの象徴的な石鳥、ついにすべてが故郷へ帰還

topArticle.title: Thousands celebrate open-air Mass with Pope Leo in Cameroon - in pictures
topArticle.description: Pope Leo XIV is on his third day in Cameroon before he heads to Angola on Saturday.

topArticle.title: Unpacking the political complexities of the Benue killings in Nigeria
topArticle.description: What we are dealing with here in Benue is a calculated, well planned, full-scale genocidal invasion and land grabbing campaign by Herder terrorists and bandits, which ... is worsening every year.
topArticle.titleJa: ナイジェリアのベヌエ州における殺害事件の政治的複雑性を解き明かす
topArticle.summary: ナイジェリアのベヌエ州で発生している殺害事件は、牧畜民テロリストによる計画的な大量虐殺と土地強奪であり、毎年悪化する深刻な紛争である。

topArticle.title: School shootings a new trauma for Turkey as nation mourns
topArticle.description: An expert tells the BBC the attack in Kahramanmaras was a tragedy but "not a surprise".
topArticle.titleJa: 学校銃乱射事件がトルコに新たなトラウマをもたらす

topArticle.title: Palestinians hand over suspect in 1982 attack on Jewish restaurant in Paris
topArticle.description: Hicham Harb is suspected of directing the attack in the Rue des Rosiers and acting as one of the gunmen who shot at diners.

topArticle.title: Greek police using masked migrants to forcibly push other migrants back across border
topArticle.description: Mercenaries recruited since at least 2020 for illegal migrant ‘pushbacks’ in Greece, BBC told

topArticle.title: How many people did Vlad actually impale?

topArticle.title: Peru election drags into second day after ballot delivery fiasco

topArticle.title: Fake Australian, Chinese and Brazilian police stations: BBC goes inside a seized scam compound
topArticle.description: Almost nothing was known about the Royal Hill casino until the Thai military took control of it in December.
topArticle.titleJa: 偽の豪州、中国、ブラジル警察署：BBCが押収された詐欺施設内部へ

topArticle.title: Community micro-hydropower plants revolutionise isolated areas of the Dominican Republic
topArticle.description: Community micro-hydropower projects in the DR rely on local leadership to deliver energy from renewable sources to isolated areas excluded from national distribution systems, contributing to reduced greenhouse gas emissions.
topArticle.titleJa: ドミニカ共和国の孤立地域を変革するコミュニティ型小水力発電所
topArticle.summary: ドミニカ共和国の孤立地域で、地域主導の小水力発電プロジェクトが再生可能エネルギーを供給し、温室効果ガス削減に貢献。住民の生活改善と持続可能な発展を促進。

topArticle.title: How Bad Bunny brought the issue of Puerto Rico’s power grid into world view
topArticle.description: Puerto Rico’s electricity system has faced repeated crises since 2017’s Hurricane Maria, which destroyed much of the grid and triggered the longest blackout in modern U.S. history; outages remain routine.
topArticle.titleJa: バッド・バニーがプエルトリコの電力網問題をいかに世界に知らしめたか
topArticle.summary: プエルトリコの電力システムは、ハリケーン・マリア以降繰り返される危機に直面。バッド・バニーがこの問題に光を当て、世界的な注目を集めた。

topArticle.title: Ecuador’s Netanyahu and Trump supporters target Ecuadorian–Iranian Cultural Center
topArticle.description: Wars no longer have defined frontlines. Battlefields can be anywhere those in power decide that a neighbor, due to their faith, ethnicity, or background, is an enemy.
topArticle.titleJa: エクアドルのネタニヤフおよびトランプ支持者がエクアドル・イラン文化センターを標的に
topArticle.summary: エクアドルでネタニヤフとトランプの支持者がエクアドル・イラン文化センターを標的とし、信仰や出自を理由に対立を生む新たな形の紛争を示唆。

topArticle.title: Concerns grow as Jamaica ends Cuban medical programme
topArticle.description: Terminating the decades-old programme that brought hundreds of Cuban medical personnel to its shores is an unusual move, especially for a programme that had been running smoothly for 50 years.
topArticle.titleJa: ジャマイカがキューバ人医師派遣プログラムを終了、懸念高まる
topArticle.summary: ジャマイカが50年間続いたキューバ人医師派遣プログラムを終了し、医療提供への影響や両国関係の行方に懸念が広がっている。

topArticle.title: Nawat language now has its own Wikipedia
topArticle.description: The New Year brought an exciting announcement: the official launch of Wikipedia in Nawat, the result of several years of training and community-building across communities in El Salvador and beyond.
topArticle.titleJa: ナワット語に独自のウィキペディアが開設
topArticle.summary: エルサルバドルなどで数年間の努力とコミュニティ構築を経て、ナワット語のウィキペディアが公式に立ち上げられた。言語の保存と発展における重要な一歩。

topArticle.title: Healing a region: How healthcare is bringing peace to Arauca, Colombia
topArticle.description: Reliable, inclusive healthcare does more than treat illness. It can function as social glue that softens community strain and transforms clinics into safe spaces for everyone.
topArticle.titleJa: 地域を癒す：コロンビア、アラウカにおける医療がいかに平和をもたらしているか
topArticle.summary: コロンビアのアラウカ地域では、信頼できる包括的な医療が、単なる病気治療を超えて、コミュニティの緊張を和らげ、平和をもたらす社会的接着剤として機能している。

topArticle.title: Japan reveals new name for 40C-and-hotter days after blistering summer
topArticle.description: The term - kokushobi - translates to "cruelly hot", "brutally hot" or "severely hot", and comes after Japan's hottest summer on record.
topArticle.titleJa: 日本、記録的な猛暑を受け40度以上の日に新名称を発表
topArticle.summary: 日本が記録的な猛暑を経験した後、40度以上の日に「酷暑日」という新名称を発表した。この新語は「残酷なほど暑い」という意味を持つ。

topArticle.title: Runaway wolf finally captured after nine-day search in South Korea
topArticle.description: The search has been marked by twists and turns, gripping South Korea and even inspiring a meme coin.
topArticle.titleJa: 逃走中のオオカミ、9日間の捜索の末ついに韓国で捕獲
topArticle.summary: 韓国で9日間逃走していたオオカミがようやく捕獲された。この捜索は紆余曲折を経て韓国国民を魅了し、ミームコインまで生み出した。

topArticle.title: Marcos says key suspect in Philippine corruption firestorm arrested
topArticle.description: Ex-MP Zaldy Co has been detained in Prague, ending months of hiding.
topArticle.titleJa: マルコス大統領、フィリピン汚職騒動の主要容疑者が逮捕されたと発表
topArticle.summary: マルコス大統領は、フィリピンの汚職騒動における主要容疑者である元議員ザルディ・コがプラハで拘束され、数ヶ月にわたる潜伏生活が終わったと発表した。

topArticle.title: Kazakhstan initiates dispute regarding Indonesia duties on imported hot-rolled steel coils
topArticle.description: Kazakhstan has requested WTO dispute consultations with Indonesia regarding additional ad valorem import duties on hot-rolled steel coils originating from Kazakhstan. The request was circulated to WTO members on 15 April. This is the first time that Kazakhstan has brought a case as a complainant to the WTO dispute settlement system.
topArticle.titleJa: カザフスタン、インドネシアの熱延鋼板輸入関税を巡り紛争を開始
topArticle.summary: カザフスタンが、インドネシアによる熱延鋼板に対する追加輸入関税についてWTO紛争協議を要請。カザフスタンがWTO紛争解決制度の申立人となるのは初。

topArticle.title: Viet Nam submits request to join Expansion of the Information Technology Agreement
topArticle.description: Viet Nam has submitted a request to join the 2015 Expansion of the Information Technology Agreement (ITA II), the Committee of Participants on the Expansion of Trade in Information Technology Products, Mr Andrei Rusu of Romania, informed members at a meeting on 15 April. Viet Nam, already a member of the 1996 ITA, which eliminates duties on 203 IT products, intends to submit its draft tariff commitments in due course to cover a further 201 products under the ITA II.
topArticle.titleJa: ベトナム、情報技術協定拡大への参加を申請
topArticle.summary: ベトナムが2015年情報技術協定拡大（ITA II）への参加を申請。既に1996年ITA加盟国で、さらに201製品の関税撤廃を目指す。

topArticle.title: Morocco launches safeguard investigation on certain types of rice
topArticle.description: On 13 April 2026, Morocco notified the WTO’s Committee on Safeguards that it had initiated on the same day (i.e. 13 April 2026) a safeguard investigation on imports of certain types of rice.
topArticle.titleJa: モロッコ、特定の種類の米に関するセーフガード調査を開始
topArticle.summary: モロッコは2026年4月13日、特定の種類の米の輸入に対しセーフガード調査を開始したことをWTOに通知した。
